selections.name: Accelerando
selections.reason: Drops from MSW to MOC and holds the highest speed figures in the field. Inner turf favors tactical speed and inside posts, which sets up perfectly here.

selections.name: Mac Gowan
selections.reason: Shows strong early speed and class figures. The inner turf course places a premium on tactical positioning, making him a major threat.

selections.name: Bright Angel (IRE)
selections.reason: Draws the rail on a tight inner turf course where saving ground is critical. Solid class rating of 90.

selections.name: Castle Harbour
selections.reason: Veteran runner with a 97 speed figure. Will need to overcome the outside draw but has the tactical ability to factor.

danger_horse.name: Spikephil
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed a 98 speed figure and draws well inside. Capable of outrunning his odds if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Closing Appeal
selections.reason: Consistent figures and gets the rail. The Tapeta surface is fair, allowing her to save ground and make a sustained late run.

selections.name: Danish Cookie
selections.reason: Outside draw is not a penalty in Tapeta sprints. Holds a strong 91 speed figure and can stalk the pace effectively.

selections.name: Call Me Misslucky
selections.reason: Solid 90 speed rating and gets a favorable inside draw. Should be in the mix late.

selections.name: The Scarlet Tiara
selections.reason: Has shown enough in past performances to suggest she can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Hope She Fires
danger_horse.reason: Taking action on the morning line (3/1) despite lower figures. Connections command respect.

selections.name: Princessonamission
selections.reason: A massive standout on figures with a 99 speed and 100 class rating. Perfectly drawn inside for this synthetic route.

selections.name: Reload Eh
selections.reason: Solid 94 speed figure and projects to get a clean stalking trip. The logical alternative to the favorite.

selections.name: Aussie Hyper
selections.reason: Has the late kick required to succeed on the Tapeta. Should be rolling late.

selections.name: Ecliptical Ladybug
selections.reason: Figures fit well for the exotics and should appreciate the fair nature of the synthetic track.

danger_horse.name: Pipinna
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced with upside. Could improve enough to crash the exotics.

selections.name: Miss Soothsayer
selections.reason: Towering 106 speed figure and 102 class rating. Mark Casse trainee drops in class and looks formidable despite the outside draw.

selections.name: Keytothepark
selections.reason: Excellent 103 speed figure. Should secure a great tactical spot from post 4 on this tight inner turf course.

selections.name: Tap My Desire
selections.reason: Consistent 101 figures across the board. Inside draw is a major advantage on the inner turf.

selections.name: Lotta Gems
selections.reason: Solid class rating of 97 and has the tactical speed to overcome the slightly wider draw.

danger_horse.name: Really Big Show
danger_horse.reason: Gets the rail and has a 95 class rating. Could easily hit the board at a big price.

selections.name: Minimum Forty
selections.reason: Massive 117 class rating and won last out. Draws the rail and is the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Mrs. C
selections.reason: Offers great value at 8/1 with a 104 speed and 108 class rating. Should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Wozniacki
selections.reason: Strong 102 speed and 107 class. Inside draw is favorable and should be right in the mix.

selections.name: Arianna's Tour
selections.reason: High class rating of 110. Has the late kick that plays very well on the Tapeta surface.

danger_horse.name: Mobula
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner with a 108 class rating. Outside draw is fine in this sprint.

selections.name: Real Savvy
selections.reason: Boasts a field-best 114 speed figure. The rail draw in a route race allows him to save ground and dictate terms.

selections.name: Phillip My Wine
selections.reason: Casse trainee with a 111 speed figure. Will be flying late, which perfectly suits the Tapeta bias.

selections.name: Thornbury
selections.reason: Strong 112 speed rating. Can stalk the pace and make a sustained move on the turn.

selections.name: Private Label
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 110 rating. Should get a clean trip from the outside.

danger_horse.name: Holiday Snooze
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 104 class rating and draws well. A logical inclusion in all exotics.

selections.name: North York
selections.reason: Strong 104 speed and 105 class. Inside draw on the tight inner turf is a major advantage.

selections.name: Let's Go Souper
selections.reason: Solid 99 speed and 104 class. Has the tactical speed to get into a prime position early.

selections.name: She Reigns
selections.reason: Casse trainee with consistent 99 figures. Will need to overcome the outside draw but has the talent.

selections.name: Elissa's Macho
selections.reason: Massive 111 class rating makes her a huge threat if she can translate that to the turf.

danger_horse.name: Chocolatecroissant (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Gets the rail and has solid 95 figures. Can save all the ground and hit the board.

selections.name: Gizmo's B F F
selections.reason: Strong 100 speed figure. The outside draw is not a detriment in Tapeta sprints, allowing a clean outside run.

selections.name: Lady Moonshine
selections.reason: Matches the top pick with a 100 speed figure and gets a great inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Gretna Green
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field at 104. Will be closing late and picking up the pieces.

selections.name: Saucy Name
selections.reason: Solid 98 speed and 99 class. Should get a good stalking trip from the middle of the gate.

danger_horse.name: Happy Valentine
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 98 speed figure and has the tactical speed to be involved early.
